ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND(ISCHANGED(Fourth_Proposal_Date__c),Fourth_Proposal_Date__c> TODAY()),
AND(OR(ISCHANGED(Fourth_Proposal_Date__c),ISCHANGED(Third_Proposal_Date__c)), Third_Proposal_Date__c> Fourth_Proposal_Date__c),
AND(OR(ISCHANGED(Fourth_Proposal_Date__c),ISCHANGED(Second_Proposal_Date__c)), Second_Proposal_Date__c > Fourth_Proposal_Date__c),
AND(OR(ISCHANGED(Fourth_Proposal_Date__c),ISCHANGED(Initial_Proposal_Date__c)), Initial_Proposal_Date__c > Fourth_Proposal_Date__c)
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Fourth Proposal Date should not be future date and greater than others Proposal Date
